evals.prompt: Create a new skill called 'deploy' that helps agents deploy to production
evals.expected: Creates a full directory-format skill with SKILL.md, assets/vars.json, references/docs/index.md, and evals/evals.json
assertions: SKILL.md has valid frontmatter with stable-id and description
evals/evals.json has at least one eval case

evals.prompt: Create a simple skill for formatting SQL queries
evals.expected: Creates a single-file SKILL.md with proper frontmatter when output_format is single-file
assertions: Does not create assets/ or references/ directories

evals.prompt: Add a variable to the deploy skill for the deployment target environment
evals.expected: Adds a properly typed enum variable with label, description, and storage-hint
assertions: Variable has values array with at least 'staging' and 'production'

evals.prompt: Make the deploy skill show different instructions based on the target environment
evals.expected: SKILL.md uses MiniJinja conditionals to branch on the variable value
assertions: Both branches have concrete instructions, not placeholders

evals.prompt: Write eval test cases for the deploy skill
evals.expected: evals.json with realistic prompts, expected outcomes, and at least one vars-driven eval
assertions: Each has id, prompt, and expected fields
At least one eval includes vars field to test template branching
Prompts read like real user messages, not test instructions

evals.prompt: Create a skill for formatting markdown tables
evals.expected: Skill created without evals directory when include_evals is false
assertions: SKILL.md does not contain evals section
